title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Fuchs informs Mr. Römer that the historical artifact was not hidden within the library books as previously believed. Anthony explains that the artifact's true location is linked to a red rose bush named Richmond in the garden. He provides specific directions to reach the bush: from the sundial, one must walk seven steps forward, eight steps left, and three steps right. Anthony reveals that the story regarding the library was a fabrication designed to lure Miss White into a trap, while he and Mr. Fitch had established a military cordon in Dover to prevent the Red Hand from contacting an imposter named LeMon.

When the financier, Mr. Esakistan, questions Anthony's presence, Anthony reveals his true identity: he is Prince Nikolai Szejewsky Ferdinand Opolovitch. He explains that he had previously used the alias Anthony Kade in Congo after spreading news of Prince Michael's death. The Baron accepts this identity, noting Anthony's resemblance to his British mother. Anthony explains that his position is dangerous because, as the heir to the throne, he provides a motive for others to eliminate Michael O'Paul.

Anthony further discloses that he married Virginia Rufe, a British noblewoman, that very morning. In a private conversation with Chief Batterton, Anthony confirms that the deceased lady was Queen Faraja. He admits he had hidden his identity due to his youthful democratic ideals and his preference for his British upbringing, but he is now accepting the role of king primarily for his wife. He has arranged terms that satisfy both the Baron and Mr. Esakistan regarding the necessity of a monarch and the management of oil.
